model_note: Occam-style v6: keep only baryonic Newton baseline, Dw, sigma, outward cumulative propagation P, and a saturating propagation-to-gap map. External describability gap is modeled solely as a function of cumulative outward propagation.

minimal_story.sigma_i: local structural mismatch from neighboring segments
minimal_story.Q_i: propagation source taken as sigma_i only (saturating normalized)
minimal_story.P_i: outward cumulative attenuated sum of Q_i from inner shells
